title: Fukrey Boyzzz

subTitle: Due to Covid-19, schools around the country have been shut. However, the boys' excitement is soon crushed when they learn about the online classes.

subTitle: As Kanishk continues to lose to Kris despite all his evil plans, Guru Mahasur sends for the cunning Heemka, Kanishk's old enemy from school.

subTitle: The evil serpent king, Kaliya, contaminates the water with his deadly venom. So when the plants start to die and his friends start to get affected by the venom, Krishna vanquishes the demonic serpent.

subTitle: The evil scorpion monster, Bichhu Bhai, comes out of the sea to wreak havoc on baby Little Singham and his friends. So, the gang uses a banana boat they found to drive Bichhu Bhai back into the sea.

subTitle: Titoo assists a bear cub in safely coming back from the forest. However, this results in numerous chaotic and humorous situations.

title: Fukrey Boyzzz
subTitle: Based on Choocha's dream, the gang decide to make a swag band. However, Murti sir is against the band, and asks them to focus on classical music.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: Dr J invents a monstrous creature, Junior, with his evil DNA. Later, Kanishk plans to enlist Junior's help to put an end to Kris and his shenanigans.

title: Little Krishna
subTitle: Kamsa has a giant serpent demon disguise itself as a cave, and lures Krishna and his friends into its mouth. But when his friends get trapped in the demon's belly, Krishna fights to save them.

title: Haddi Mera Buddy
subTitle: When Billy becomes sick after eating too much junk food, Mandy has Grim make some of his Granny Grim remedies. But when Billy drinks the remedy, a growth appears on his back that looks like him.

subTitle: The children's school trip takes an unexpected turn when their bus breaks down. Subsequently, Little Singham encounters an evil doll, forcing him to engage in a series of games.

title: Little Singham
subTitle: A powerful new wrestler arrives to challenge the best fighters in Mirchi Nagar. Consequently, Little Singham accepts to enter the ring and face him.

title: Little Singham
subTitle: KC seizes a high mountain peak to mine a super-charged mineral. So, Little Singham must master high-altitude warfare to reclaim the peak and prevent an attack on major Indian cities.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: Baby Little Singham and his friends play with a drone which later turns into an evil robot that is programmed to capture them.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: The gang decides to learn karate from Havaldar's karate practice on the beach. Later, when Kung Fu Kekda shows up on the beach, the gang chases him around, eager to show off their new skills.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: While playing Peek-a-boo on the beach, Baby Little Singham and his friends are interrupted by the evil Rowdy Rhino. So, Baby Little Singham devises a plan to send him back into the portal.

title: Baby Little Singham
subTitle: The gang have fun playing games with a mermaid that comes to shore. Later, Shambala appears and wreaks havoc on their playtime, forcing the mermaid to use her powers to send him back into the portal.

title: Smaashhing Simmba
subTitle: Simmba, an honest and courageous police officer, teams up with his fearless colleagues in his mission to confront and defeat the evil forces of society.

title: Little Krishna
subTitle: When Krishna is barely ten days old, Kamsa sends the evil witch Putana in disguise to kill him. But even as an infant, Krishna uses his powers to slay the demonic witch.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: After Kanishk and Dr J unearth a mystical lamp in the desert, they invoke the wicked genie, Jintu, to seek his help destroying Kris for once and for all.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: Kris and his friends set up a free pet wash for the people at school. But when Dr J brings his three kittens, they transform into ninja kittens and wreak havoc.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: The kids plan a surprise party for Bablu on his birthday. Meanwhile, Kanishk devises a plan to get rid of Kris and summon a demon spider from the netherworld.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: Kanishk summons an evil scarecrow to attack Kris and his friends. Soon, Kris becomes overwhelmed when the other kids start to turn into scarecrows and attack him.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: The demon yoga practitioner, Yogachari returns from the netherworld to take his revenge on Kris. But Yogachari's demonic bracelets and bangles are no match for Kris' powers.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: After being bitten by a strange bug, Bablu turns into a superhero. Later, Kanishk enlists Dr J's help to carry out his evil plan of destroying Bablu and Kris.
